message:
test(fuzz): HRW checkpoint coordinator selection (ntsi4)

Add fuzz_hrw_checkpoint_coordinator covering the NORMATIVE
coordinator-selection primitives (checkpoint.rs:620-698):
hrw_hash_checkpoint, select_checkpoint_coordinator, and
rank_checkpoint_coordinators. Properties: hash determinism,
length-prefix framing collision resistance across (zone, epoch, node)
boundary splits, select returns None iff input empty, argmax
invariant, selected ∈ eligible, rank length matches input, rank
descending by hash, rank head == select, rank is a multiset
permutation of eligible, and select/rank determinism. Once-gated
anchors verify a hand-picked rank ordering, the empty-input case,
the framing collision resistance with 'zone-suffix','node-1' vs
'zone-suffixnode-1','' as a deliberate boundary swap.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
